entities.description: The amount of water stored in the soil, influenced by tillage and irrigation

entities.description: The process of converting organic nitrogen to inorganic forms in the soil

entities.name: PULLMAN CLAY LOAM

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage of the crop occurring 60 days after emergence

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of ensuring long-term crop productivity through appropriate tillage
